title: Shield Mod
description: a mod that adds new shields for 1.21
body:
THIS MOD IS IN BETA!!

anyway we made this because we thought it would be cool, we plan to add enchantments and animations along with more accuracy but in the meantime, here are our features...

three new craftable shields, the golden, diamond, and netherite shield(it's fireproof), they currently don't have different stats

and that's it, enjoy
